extension_description.message: Auto-group tabs by domain or custom rules. Parent tab inheritance and keyboard shortcuts included.

enable_auto_group_desc.message: Automatically group tabs when they are created or URL changes

minimum_tabs_desc.message: Minimum number of tabs with same domain before grouping

auto_ungroup_desc.message: Automatically ungroup when tabs in a group fall below the minimum threshold

inherit_parent_group.description: Label for inherit parent group toggle

inherit_parent_group_desc.message: When clicking a link in a grouped tab, new tab joins parent's group
inherit_parent_group_desc.description: Description for inherit parent group toggle

strategy_domain_desc.message: Group by full domain (e.g., github.com, gitlab.com)

strategy_sec_domain.description: Strategy name for secondary domain grouping

strategy_sec_domain_desc.message: Group by second-level domain (e.g., github.com from user.github.com)

strategy_custom_desc.message: Define your own grouping rules with patterns

fallback_strategy_desc.message: What to do when no rule matches

fallback_sec_domain.description: Fallback option: group by secondary domain

reset_defaults.description: Button to reset settings to defaults

command_group_current.description: Command description for group current tab

command_ungroup_current.description: Command description for ungroup current tab
